title: picris hieracioides subsp. crepoides
intro: Picris hieracioides subsp. crepoides, also known as crepoid hawk's beard or Picris crepoides, is a biennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and has been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Picris hieracioides subsp. crepoides include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote digestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
